description: mal, T cell differentiation protein [Source:HGNC Symbol;Acc:HGNC:6817]
domain_descriptions: MARVEL domain-containing and chemokine-like factor proteins
structural_features: MARVEL domain-containing and chemokine-like factor proteins
conserved_regions: MARVEL domain-containing and chemokine-like factor proteins
ciliary_role: MAL overexpression is associated with shortened or absent cilia, abnormal cilium and cyst development. MAL may facilitate the organisation of apical cargo into microdomains to facilitate their targeting and trafficking (22895261). Involved in the proper condensation of membranes at the ciliary base, required for efficient primary cilium extension (25967552).

ai_summary.basic_summary: MAL is a ciliary gene encoding mal, t cell differentiation protein [source:hgnc symbol;acc:hgnc:6817]
